Services

SOME OF THE WORK'S WE DO TO IMPROVE OUR SOCIETY

Everything is easy when You are Busy but nothing is easy when you are Lazy

-Swami Vivekananda

EDUCATIONAL WORK

  • 1. Special classes are taken for students from 1st standard to 5th standard in the evenings.
  • 2. Daily spoken English Class is taken for Students of 11th, 12th, and even for College Students.
  • 3. Special Classes are taken for Students who are appearing for 10th public exams and Sufficient study material is provided to them.
  • 4. Career Guidance is given for Students from the poor economic background and also for Toppers.
  • 5. Through Our Trust, more than 35 Students are doing their Under Graduates.
  • 6. For slow learners, special classes are taken every Sunday.

SPIRITUAL WORK

  • 1. Prayers are done daily in the morning and in Afternoon along with meditation and Bajans.
  • 2. Spiritual Classes are taken every Sunday. Children and common people are made to participate in this spiritual talk session.
  • 3. These Spiritual Classes are taken bases on the rules and regulations of the Ramakrishna Mission.
  • 4. Special occasions like Diwali, Christmas,Birthday of Swami Vivekananda and Sri Ramakrishna Paramahamsa are celebrated.
  • 5. In these special days, food and clothes are provided to Poor people.

SOCIAL WORK

  • 1. Sister Niveditha Library is Created with more than 3000 Books which the students and common people can use every Friday and Saturday.
  • 2. To encourage self-employment among People training in Tailoring, Makeup and Beauty Products is given.
  • 3. These Training are given by Conducting Short term courses and classes
  • 4. Awareness is given to people on various job openings on central and state government.

MEDICAL WORK

  • 1. Every year medical camp is being set up for people in our locality.
  • 2. In these medical camps eye, ear and general medical services are provided.

PERSONALITY DEVELOPMENT

  • 1. Every Saturday 35 students are selected and personality development training is given to them
  • 2. In this, an chief guest is made to give a speech about swami vivekanatha and his teachings
  • 3. Weakly once social responsibility class is taken to youngsters
  • 4. students in urban and rural areas are taken excursion once a year
